notes: Follow the team's coding standards. All exported functions must have JSDoc comments. Avoid inline styles in Vue components.

customRules.message: Avoid using 'any' — use a specific type or 'unknown'.
customRules.fixHint: Replace with a specific type. Use 'unknown' + type guard if the shape is truly unknown.

customRules.description: Magic numbers should be named constants
customRules.message: Magic number detected — consider extracting to a named constant.
customRules.fixHint: Define a const (e.g. const MAX_RETRIES = 3) and reference it by name.
